sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel data documented for NES platformer of this era

special_mechanics.name: Crouch
special_mechanics.description: Player can crouch with control pad

special_mechanics.name: Water Spout Spell
special_mechanics.description: Creates upward column of water that allows Kuros to reach high places; limited uses before vanishing

special_mechanics.name: Fall Damage
special_mechanics.description: Life meter decreases if player falls for too long a distance

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics overview but no quantified physics parameters (speeds, gravity values, acceleration rates, or frame data). Movement documented only as directional pad control for left/right movement and crouch. Jump mechanics implied but not numerically specified.
